executives.name: Mercedes Johnson
executives.background: Mercedes Johnson has been a director since 2014. She was formerly the Senior Vice President and CFO of Avago Technologies Limited and CFO of Lam Research Corporation.

executives.name: Richard Beyer
executives.background: Mr. Beyer was the Chairman and CEO of Freescale Semiconductor, Inc. and has held executive roles at Intersil Corporation and Elantec Semiconductor.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director
